issue_summary: Add ObjectMapper.setVisibility(VisibilityChecker) to replace setVisibilityChecker (which is non-chainable).
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Method for setting currently configured visibility checker;
     * object used for determining whether given property element
     * (method, field, constructor) can be auto-detected or not.
     * This default checker is used if no per-class overrides
     * are defined.
     */
